scenario.name: GenCall - OPTIONS Ping
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "GenCall" <sip:gencall@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Contact: <sip:gencall@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
